title: Require '@PathVariable' annotation for path variables
description: When a method parameter is used as a path variable in a Spring controller, it must be annotated with '@PathVariable'. Omitting this annotation can lead to unexpected behavior or runtime errors. This rule ensures all path variables are properly annotated for clarity and reliability.
recommendation: Always annotate method parameters that are used as path variables with '@PathVariable' in Spring controllers.

checks.message: Method parameters corresponding to path variables must be annotated with @PathVariable.
